name: echocenter-frontend-v2
description: EchoCenter v2 UI — Linear/Vercel-style redesign (zero-build HTML + React via Babel standalone CDN).

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp -R index.html styles.css src dist/

scripts.test: echo 'v2 prototype — no tests configured' && exit 0
